resultList.dtldesc: Embrace the allure of contemporary living with this exquisite 2 BHK Flat for Sale in Raja Annamalai Puram, Chennai, showcasing the charm of new construction and modern design.Property Specifications This exquisite property, spanning a carpet area of 950 square feet, is the epitome of thoughtful design and modern living. Located on the auspicious east-facing side, this home ensures that positive energy flows abundantly, aligning with the principles of Vastu. As you step into this semi-furnished haven, you are greeted by a sense of warmth and tranquility. Spread across one of the three floors, this residence boasts two elegantly designed bedrooms, providing a perfect sanctuary for rest and rejuvenation. The attached master bathroom follows a contemporary Western style, complementing the overall aesthetic. Additionally, a common bathroom caters to the needs of guests and residents alike, maintaining a perfect blend of convenience and privacy.Embracing the concept of outdoor living, this residence features two balconiesone attached to the master bedroom and another to a secondary bedroom. These outdoor spaces not only offer panoramic views but also serve as serene retreats for relaxation. The separate living and dining areas allow for distinct zones, ideal for entertaining guests or enjoying intimate family moments.Adding a touch of spirituality, a small Pooja room within the premises provides a dedicated space for prayer and reflection. The regular kitchen, equipped with a platform and sink, is designed for both efficiency and aesthetics. The presence of a piped gas connection ensures a hassle-free cooking experience, while the utility attached to the kitchen further enhances functionality. Step onto the exquisite vitrified flooring that not only adds a touch of elegance but also ensures easy maintenance, creating a perfect canvas for your personal style.Facilities This property offers covered parking, water supply from both borewell and corporation sources, 100 power backup, and the assurance of safety with a security guard and CCTV surveillance. Accessing different levels is made easy with the presence of one lift.Locality This home is strategically situated in a vibrant locality, with Hari Shree Vidyalaya School as a prominent landmark. Within a km radius, youll find hospitals, malls, and supermarkets, ensuring that your daily needs are met effortlessly. Public transportation is readily available, while banks and ATMs are conveniently located for your financial transactions. The property is a mere 500 meters away from both the railway and metro stations, facilitating seamless connectivity to the rest of the city.
